name: Rat Royal
short_description: Rat Royal is an exhilarating, asymmetrical multiplayer game! Embark on thrilling adventures as cunning rats, tasked with unleashing chaos, or take on the role of an exterminator on a mission to eradicate them. With unique mechanics and fast-paced gameplay, every game is full of strategy and tension.
detailed_description:
Rat Royal – The Ultimate Asymmetrical Battle for Survival!

Prepare for chaos in Rat Royal, an intense asymmetrical multiplayer game (2-8 players) where sneaky rodents go head-to-head against relentless exterminators. Whether you're outsmarting your enemies as a crafty rat or hunting down pests as a ruthless exterminator, every match is a thrilling fight for survival!

🐭 Play as the Rats – Small, Fast, and Clever!

As a rat, your mission is to steal valuable objects, sabotage key locations, and avoid being caught at all costs. Use speed and agility to navigate the environment and complete your objectives before time runs out!

🔹 Key Abilities:

  • Attack: Fight back against exterminators if you’re cornered!

  • Eat Cheese: Randomly spawned cheese can restore your health.

  • Carry Stolen Items: Pick up and transport objects to complete missions.

  • Use Mouse Holes: Quickly escape by squeezing through mouse holes to access hidden paths.

But beware—one wrong move, and you might find yourself trapped, poisoned, or gassed!

☠️ Play as the Exterminators – Hunt Down the Rats!

As an exterminator, your job is to eliminate the rats and prevent them from causing destruction. With an arsenal of deadly tools, you must track them down, outthink them, and wipe them out before they complete their objectives.

🔹 Key Abilities:

  • Attack: Strike down rats before they escape.

  • Set Traps: Place mouse traps in key locations to catch unsuspecting rodents.

  • Poison Cheese: Lure rats in with baited food that will drain their health.

  • Gas Mouse Holes: If a rat hides in a mouse hole, flush it out—or kill it instantly!

  • Carry & Throw Objects: Use the environment to your advantage by throwing objects at rats.

Victory belongs to those who can outsmart and outmaneuver their opponents. Will you let the rats slip through your fingers, or will you reign as the ultimate exterminator?

🏚️ Explore Dynamic Maps with Unique Strategies!

Each match takes place in a highly interactive environment, requiring players to think fast and adapt.

  • Warehouse 🏭 – A massive industrial storage facility full of obstacles, hiding spots, and sneaky shortcuts.

  • House 🏠 – A cozy home turned battleground, where every room presents new dangers and opportunities.

⚔️ Fast-Paced Action with Strategic Depth!

  • Asymmetrical Multiplayer: Two completely different playstyles create unpredictable matches.

  • High Replayability: Every round is different thanks to dynamic gameplay and player choices.

  • Interactive Objects: Pick up, throw, and use objects to gain the upper hand.

  • Teamwork & Strategy: Communication and coordination are key to victory!

Will you outwit the exterminators and complete your mission as a cunning rat, or will you crush the infestation and claim victory as a relentless hunter?

The battle for survival begins now! 🔥🐭🔨
